name: conductor-lsm
description: Living System Model for the Conductor AI orchestration system. Provides lsm_search and lsm_write tools for semantic memory across sessions — stores decisions, failures, and architectural context as searchable embeddings via Cohere.
author: lemone112

requiredEnv.name: COHERE_API_KEY
requiredEnv.description: Cohere API key for embed-english-v3.0 embeddings

optionalEnv.name: LSM_DATA_DIR
optionalEnv.description: Path to JSONL data directory. Default: ~/.claude/conductor-lsm/data

optionalEnv.name: HTTPS_PROXY
optionalEnv.description: HTTP proxy URL if required (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:12334)
